document_url.title: Document Url
document_url.description:
The URL of the document to be processed. You can provide one of the following:
1. A publicly available URL
2. A presigned S3 URL
3. A reducto:// prefixed URL obtained from the /upload endpoint after directly uploading a document

form_schema.title: Form Schema
form_schema.description: Form schema for PDF forms. List of widgets with their types, descriptions, and bounding boxes. Only works for PDFs.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: If True, attempts to process the job with priority if the user has priority processing budget available; by default, sync jobs are prioritized above async jobs.
